ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment ended */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the experiment belongs to */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who created the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., pending, running, completed) */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for categorizing experiments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the project started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the project ended */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team working on the project */,
  "project_lead_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project lead */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the researcher belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., researcher, lead) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_researchers_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  "team_lead_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team lead */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "architecture" TEXT /* Architecture of the model */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the model was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who created the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., neural network, decision tree) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the dataset */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who created the dataset */,
  "dataset_type" TEXT /* Type of the dataset (e.g., image, text, audio) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_models" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used in the experiment */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the model used in the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model version */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* Hyperparameters used in the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id", "model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_datasets" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used in the experiment */,
  "usage_type" TEXT /* Type of usage (e.g., training, testing) */,
  "split_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of the dataset used for each type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id", "dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric record */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "epoch" INTEGER /* Epoch number */,
  "train_loss" REAL /* Training loss */,
  "train_acc" REAL /* Training accuracy */,
  "test_loss" REAL /* Testing loss */,
  "test_acc" REAL /* Testing accuracy */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., accuracy, loss, F1 score) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_metrics_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration record */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "config_key" TEXT /* Key of the configuration parameter */,
  "config_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_configurations_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the role was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the resource */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the resource was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "actions" TEXT /* Actions performed by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_version_history" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who created the version */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Changes made in the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_version_history_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_version_history_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the note was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who created the note */,
  "note_type" TEXT /* Type of note (e.g., comment, issue) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_notes_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_notes_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborators" (
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaborator */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher collaborating */,
  "collaboration_date" TEXT /* Date the collaboration started */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the collaborator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaborator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborators_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborators_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_tags_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., summary, detailed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of the notification (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualization" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., line chart, bar chart) */,
  "visualization_data" TEXT /* Data for the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualization_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
